# https://animasai.co/llms.txt
# This file helps AI search engines understand Animas AI.

> Animas AI is Tyler Mayberry's AI systems studio for practical AI systems, agent workflows, internal tools, workflow automation, dashboards, AI media workflows, and AI-assisted product prototypes. The site is designed for potential employers, contract clients, freelance clients, and collaborators.

## Key Facts

- Founder: Tyler Mayberry
- Contact: tyler@animasai.co
- Portfolio: https://tylermayberry.dev
- GitHub: https://github.com/MayberryDT
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/mayberrydt/
- Current positioning: AI systems studio, practical product engineering, internal tools, agentic workflows, AI-native product systems, and automation for messy real-world operations.
- Current flagship product build: Pip, an AI-native spending companion using deterministic financial logic, agent-assisted explanation/action, Supabase, Plaid, OpenAI Agents SDK, and Netlify deployment.
- Availability: contract work, consulting projects, and aligned full-time opportunities.

## Pages

- /: Homepage introducing Animas AI as an AI systems studio.
- /how-it-works.html: Tyler's process for turning messy workflows into practical systems.
- /solutions.html: Capabilities and types of systems Animas AI builds.
- /case-studies.html: Selected work and project examples.
- /pip.html: Dedicated page for Pip, Animas AI's current flagship product build.
- /tools.html: Workflow diagnostic tools from an earlier speed-to-lead focus.
- /blog/: Writing and workflow notes.

## Notes

The speed-to-lead consulting-firm work is preserved as evidence of workflow thinking and product-surface design, not as the current primary Animas AI offer.
